form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Most recently held ground to the line 2nd of 11 at Ararat Bm56 on March 30 over 2206m, 2.5 len behind My Uncle Did It with 62.5kg at $3.90. The run before that set the pace for much of the race 3rd of 8 at Warrnambool Bm62 on March 9 over 2350m, 1.75 len behind Off His Roca carrying 59.5kg at $2.90. Made headway last time. Has ability and can run a strong race.

form.formComment: Returns from a 30-day let-up. At the latest run eased back early on 6th of 12 at Kembla Grange Bm68 on March 13 over 2400m, on a slow track; 8 len behind De Louviere carrying 55kg at $6.50. The run before that 7th of 12 at Hawkesbury Bm64 on March 7 over 1800m, slow going 2.25 len behind King Kikau carrying 56.5kg at $8. Making headway. Expect improvement.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up previously. Resuming made some head-way from midfield; 2nd of 12 at Kyneton Bm56 on February 27 over 1887m, slow going 1.3 len behind So Long Ago carrying 61kg at $8. Second-up came from midfield; 2nd of 11 at Echuca Bm56 on March 21 over 2124m, 0.8 len behind Flash Of Dallas carrying 61kg at $4.80. Racing well. Big chance.
